conditions.description: Signal-confidence-aware phrasing mechanism ON — held-out 20-task slice, qwen3-235b-a22b, 1 trial
conditions.note: Model relaxed to qwen3-235b-a22b from spec's claude-sonnet-4-6 due to budget constraint ($7.18 remaining). Noted in memo.

conditions.description: Mechanism OFF proxy — dev 30-task slice, qwen3-235b-a22b, 1 trial. Used as ablation baseline because mechanism does not affect tau2-bench runner (mechanism lives in agent_core.py, not tau2 agent).
Facilitator-provided baseline — dev 30-task slice, qwen3-next-80b-a3b-thinking, 5 trials. Best-of-5 at same compute budget. Different model from held-out runs.

statistical_test.comparison: held_out_mechanism_on (0.4000, n=20) vs day1_baseline proxy (0.2667, n=30) — same model
statistical_test.interpretation: Delta A = +0.1333 on held-out vs same-model dev baseline; CIs overlap and p=0.32 (not significant at p<0.05). The mechanism targets outreach email honesty (SOC-01 probe FAIL→PASS), not tau2-bench retail task completion — the tau2-bench score reflects model capability differences, not mechanism effect. The mechanism's measured improvement is at the probe level: SOC-01 moved from FAIL to PASS after implementation.
statistical_test.caveat: Held-out and baseline use different slice sizes (20 vs 30 tasks) and the facilitator baseline uses a stronger model. A clean same-model, same-slice ablation was not run due to budget constraint.
